caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storms Bring Heavy Rain
caribbean.paragraph: St. Lucia is experiencing 88% rain probability with max wave heights of 5.3 ft and dominant swell direction from ESE. Grenada is seeing winds of 15 kt, but the main concern remains the heavy rain in St. Lucia, with lesser impacts in neighboring islands like Grenada.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Sees Gentle Winds
mediterranean.paragraph: Haifa is experiencing a 12% rain probability with winds reaching 13 kt and wave heights of 3.0 ft, while Lisbon has a less than 10% rain probability with winds at 10 kt. I expect these conditions to prevail with the dominant swell direction from the WNW, making for a relatively calm day in the Mediterranean ports.
